overall.description: A third-person game scene following a white-haired character exploring a foggy, snow-covered mountainous region at night. The character traverses a wooden cliffside platform, descends to a railway track, and ventures into a snowy wilderness with scattered pine trees.

events.description: character stops walking along platform and begins climbing down the side toward the ground
character reaches ground level, transitioning from elevated platform to ground terrain

agents.ego_description: walking along a wooden overlook platform overlooking a snowy valley, then climbing down the rocky cliffside to reach the ground below

entered.detail: elevated wooden viewing platform with planks overlooking a deep valley
simple wooden safety railing along the platform edge
deep fog-filled valley covered in snow with scattered trees visible below
steep rocky cliff face with patches of snow and ice

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a wooden overlook platform perched on a mountain cliff, overlooking a vast foggy valley. The camera follows as the character walks along the platform and then climbs down the side, descending to the ground level below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered railway track through mountain forest

events.description: character reaches the ground and begins walking alongside railway tracks
character turns right and leaves the railway tracks, heading into open wilderness

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel railway bed, flanked by snow-covered pine trees on both sides

entered.detail: metal railway tracks on wooden sleepers extending into the foggy distance
gravel and dirt ballast supporting the railway tracks
tall evergreen trees heavily covered in snow lining the railway corridor

segments.scene_description: At ground level, the character walks along a railway track cutting through a snowy forest. Snow-covered pine trees line both sides of the gravel bed as the track extends into the foggy distance, with a distant wooden structure visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered wilderness with scattered pine trees

events.description: leaving the railway corridor and entering open snow-covered field terrain

agents.ego_description: trekking through deep snow away from the railway, navigating between scattered pine trees toward distant forested hills

entered.detail: open terrain covered in deep snow with patches of grass and low vegetation
small cabin or building visible on the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the railway and ventures into an open snow-covered field. The terrain is uneven with deep snow, and pine trees become more scattered as the character progresses toward distant forested hills under the foggy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high mountain overlook into a desolate, snow-covered wilderness under a foggy night sky. It begins with the character walking along a wooden platform perched on a cliff before the camera follows their descent down the mountainside to the ground level below. As the character reaches the base, the scene shifts to a railway track cutting through a dense forest of snow-covered pine trees, with a distant wooden structure emerging through the mist. The camera then tracks the character as they turn away from the gravel bed and venture into an open, uneven field of deep snow. Finally, the terrain opens up as the pine trees become more scattered, leading the character toward distant forested hills.
